data.value: 1. Vores ydelser i naturen

data.name: 10. Governing Law

data.value: 11. Kontakt os

data.value: 3. Abonnement, fakturering og betalinger

data.value: 4. Afskaffelses- og Refunderingspolitik

data.value: 5. Køb af hardware (tredjepart)

data.name: 6. Acceptable Use Policy
data.value: 6. Politik for acceptabel brug

data.name: 7. Intellectual Property
data.value: 7. Ophavsret

data.name: 8. Limitation of Liability
data.value: 8. Ansvarsbegrænsning

data.name: 9. Modifications to the Terms
data.value: 9. Ændringer af vilkårene

data.name: Aiursoft hosts the infrastructure on our secured servers. We are responsible for server uptime, standard backups, and basic network security.
data.value: Aiursoft hoster infrastrukturen på vores sikrede servere. Vi er ansvarlige for serveropetid, standard-backups og grundlæggende netværkssikkerhed.

data.name: AIURSOFT LIMITED
data.value: AIURSOFT LIMITED

data.name: Aiursoft provides enterprise IT infrastructure solutions built upon open-source technologies (e.g., Linux, Nextcloud, Mailcow, Authentik, GitLab).
data.value: Aiursoft leverer enterprise IT-infrastrukturløsninger baseret på open-source-teknologier (f.eks. Linux, Nextcloud, Mailcow, Authentik, GitLab).

data.name: All fees are exclusive of applicable taxes, levies, or duties imposed by taxing authorities, and you shall be responsible for payment of all such taxes.
data.value: Alle gebyrer er eksklusiv gældende skatter, afgifter eller told, der pålægges af skattemyndighederne, og du er ansvarlig for betaling af alle sådanne skatter.

data.name: All payments are securely processed by our third-party payment gateway, Stripe. Aiursoft does not collect, process, or store your full credit card information on our servers.
data.value: Alle betalinger behandles sikkert af vores tredjeparts betalingsgateway, Stripe. Aiursoft indsamler, behandler eller gemmer ikke dine fulde kreditkortoplysninger på vores servere.

data.name: Any unauthorized access to your on-premise servers (for Startup/Enterprise plans).
data.value: Enhver uberettiget adgang til dine on-premise-servere (for Startup/Enterprise-planer).

data.name: Attempt to bypass or compromise any security measure implemented by Aiursoft on Cloud-Hosted plans.
data.value: Forsøg på at omgå eller kompromittere nogen sikkerhedsforanstaltning implementeret af Aiursoft på Cloud-Hosted-planer.

data.name: Automatic Renewal:
data.value: Automatisk fornyelse:

data.name: Certain features, such as offline AI Knowledge Base construction or hardware-based Zero Trust authentication, may require physical hardware (e.g., NVIDIA GPUs, YubiKeys). Unless explicitly stated in a custom enterprise contract, you are responsible for procuring this hardware directly from the respective manufacturers. Aiursoft acts solely as the software integration provider.
data.value: Visse funktioner, såsom opbygning af offline AI-videnbaser eller hardwarebaseret Zero Trust-autentificering, kan kræve fysisk hardware (f.eks. NVIDIA GPU'er, YubiKeys). Medmindre der er eksplicit angivet i en skræddersyet entreprisekontrakt, er du ansvarlig for at skaffe denne hardware direkte fra de respektive producenter. Aiursoft fungerer udelukkende som softwareintegrationsleverandør.

data.name: Cloud-Hosted Plans (e.g., Core):
data.value: Cloud-hostede abonnementer (f.eks. Core):

data.name: Company Entity: AIURSOFT LIMITED (Hong Kong)
data.value: Virksomhedsenhed: AIURSOFT LIMITED (Hong Kong)

data.name: Company:
data.value: Virksomhed:

data.name: Data loss due to hardware failure on your self-hosted infrastructure.
data.value: Datatab på grund af hardwarefejl på din selvhostede infrastruktur.

data.name: Effect of Cancellation:
data.value: Virkning af annullering:

data.name: Email:
data.value: E-mail:

data.name: For On-Premise plans requiring a One-Time Setup Fee, this fee covers the manual labor of our architects (e.g., network configuration, Docker deployment, Yubikey integration). Setup fees are strictly non-refundable once the deployment and configuration process has commenced.
data.value: For On-Premise plans requiring a One-Time Setup Fee, this fee covers the manual labor of our architects (e.g., network configuration, Docker deployment, Yubikey integration). Setup fees are strictly non-refundable once the deployment and configuration process has commenced.

data.name: How to Cancel:
data.value: Sådan afslutter du:

data.name: If you cancel your subscription, the cancellation will take effect at the end of your current paid billing cycle. You will retain full access to the Services until that cycle concludes.
data.value: Hvis du opsiger dit abonnement, træder opsigelsen i kraft ved udgangen af din nuværende betalte faktureringscyklus. Du beholder fuld adgang til Tjenesterne, indtil denne cyklus er afsluttet.

data.name: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact our executive team at:
data.value: Hvis du har spørgsmål om disse Vilkår, bedes du kontakte vores ledelsesgruppe på:

data.name: In no event shall Aiursoft's aggregate liability for all claims related to the services exceed the total amount paid by you to Aiursoft for the specific service in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
data.value: Under ingen omstændigheder må Aiursofts samlede erstatningsansvar for alle krav i forbindelse med tjenesterne overstige det samlede beløb, du har betalt til Aiursoft for den pågældende tjeneste i de tolv (12) måneder, der går forud for kravet.

data.name: Last Updated: March 2026
data.value: Sidst opdateret: Marts 2026

data.name: No Pro-Rated Refunds:
data.value: Ingen pro-ratiserede refusioner:

data.name: On-Premise Plans (e.g., Startup, Custom Enterprise):
data.value: On-Premise-planer (f.eks. Startup, Custom Enterprise):

data.name: One-Time Setup Fees:
data.value: Engangsopsættelsesgebyrer:

data.name: Payment Processing:
data.value: Betalingsbehandling:

data.name: Per-User Billing:
data.value: Fakturering pr. bruger:

data.name: Subscription fees are calculated based on the number of active users/accounts managed within your Aiursoft Identity Gateway per billing cycle.
data.value: Afgiftsgebyrer beregnes ud fra antallet af aktive brugere/konti, der administreres i din Aiursoft Identity Gateway pr. regnskabsperiode.

data.name: Taxes:
data.value: Skatter:

data.name: Terms of Service & Subscription Agreement
data.value: Servicevilkår og abonnementsaftale

data.name: The Aiursoft brand, logos, website design, and proprietary deployment scripts (e.g., Aiursoft Template orchestrations) are the intellectual property of AIURSOFT LIMITED. The underlying open-source software remains the property of their respective creators and is provided to you under their specific open-source licenses.
data.value: Aiursoft-mærket, logoer, webstedets design og proprietære udrulningscripts (f.eks. Aiursoft Template-orchestreringer) er AIURSOFT LIMITED's immaterielle ejendom. Den underliggende open-source-software forbliver ejendom af deres respektive skabere og stilles til rådighed for dig under deres specifikke open-source-licenser.

data.name: The Service is Commercial:
data.value: Tjenesten er kommerciel:

data.name: The software is deployed on your local servers or private cloud. You retain absolute physical control and ownership of your data ("Own Your Data"). Consequently, you are solely responsible for your underlying hardware, local network security, physical access control, and disaster recovery backups. Aiursoft's responsibility is limited to software-level maintenance, container updates, and technical support as defined in your plan.
data.value: Softwaren er implementeret på dine lokale servere eller din private cloud. Du beholder fuldstændig fysisk kontrol og ejerskab af dine data ("Own Your Data"). Dermed er du alene ansvarlig for din underliggende hardware, lokal netværksikkerhed, fysisk adgangskontrol og backups til katastrofegenvinding. Aiursofts ansvar er begrænset til vedligeholdelse på softwareniveau, opdateringer af containere og teknisk support som defineret i din plan.

data.name: The Software is Free:
data.value: Softwaren er gratis:

data.name: The underlying open-source codes are subject to their respective licenses (e.g., MIT, GPL). You are free to inspect, modify, and distribute the code as permitted by those licenses.
data.value: Den underliggende open-source-kode er underlagt deres respektive licenser (f.eks. MIT, GPL). Du er frit stillet til at inspicere, modificere og distribuere koden, som tilladt af disse licenser.

data.name: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Aiursoft website, products, and subscription services, including but not limited to Aiursoft Substrate (Core, Startup, and Enterprise plans) (collectively, the "Services"). By registering for an account or purchasing a subscription, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
data.value: Disse Vilkår for Service ("Vilkår") regulerer din adgang til og brug af Aiursofts hjemmeside, produkter og abonnementsydelser, herunder men ikke begrænset til Aiursoft Substrate (Core, Startup og Enterprise-planer) (samlet benævnt "Ydelserne"). Ved at registrere en konto eller købe et abonnement accepterer du at være bundet af disse Vilkår.

data.name: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
data.value: Disse vilkår skal styres af og fortolkes i overensstemmelse med lovgivningen i den særlige administrative region Hong Kong, uden hensyntagen til dennes konfliktnormer.

data.name: To ensure uninterrupted service, our commercial plans operate on a recurring subscription basis.
data.value: For at sikre en afbrydelsesfri service, kører vores kommercielle planer på et tilbagevendende abonnementsgrundlag.

data.name: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Aiursoft Limited shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from:
data.value: I det omfang, der er tilladt efter gældende lovgivning, kan Aiursoft Limited ikke holdes ansvarlig for eventuelle indirekte, tilfældige, særlige, konsekvensbaserede eller strafende skader, eller ethvert tab af overskud eller indtægter, uanset om de er opstået direkte eller indirekte, eller ethvert tab af data, brug, goodwill eller andre immaterielle tab, der udspringer af:

data.name: Use our Cloud-Hosted email services (Mailcow) to send unsolicited spam or conduct phishing campaigns. Violation of this rule will result in immediate account termination without refund.
data.value: Brug ikke vores cloud-hostede e-mail-tjenester (Mailcow) til at sende uopfordret spam eller gennemføre phishing-kampagner. Overtrædelse af denne regel vil medføre øjeblikkelig ophævelse af kontoen uden refusion.

data.name: Use the Services to conduct any illegal, fraudulent, or malicious activities.
data.value: Brug Services til at udføre ulovlige, svigagtige eller skadelige aktiviteter.

data.name: We do not provide refunds or credits for any partial-month subscription periods, or for user accounts that were provisioned but remained inactive.
data.value: Vi yder ikke refusioner eller kreditter for delvise abonnementsperioder eller for brugerkonti, der er blevet oprettet, men forblev inaktive.

data.name: We may revise these Terms from time to time to better reflect changes to the law, new regulatory requirements, or improvements made to our Services. If an update affects your use of the Services or your legal rights as a user of our Services, we’ll notify you prior to the update's effective date by sending an email to the account owner.
data.value: Vi kan fra tid til anden revidere disse Vilkår for bedre at afspejle ændringer i lovgivningen, nye regulatoriske krav eller forbedringer af vores Services. Hvis en opdatering påvirker din brug af Services eller dine juridiske rettigheder som bruger af vores Services, vil vi underrette dig før opdateringens ikrafttrædelse ved at sende en e-mail til kontoens ejer.

data.name: We offer different tiers of deployment to suit your business needs:
data.value: Vi tilbyder forskellige niveauer af implementering for at imødekomme dine forretningsbehov:

data.name: Welcome to Aiursoft. We are dedicated to bringing the spirit of open-source and free software to every enterprise and individual.
data.value: Velkommen til Aiursoft. Vi er dedikeret til at bringe ånden af open-source og fri software til hver enkelt virksomhed og privatperson.

data.name: What you are purchasing from Aiursoft is the hosting, automated deployment, maintenance, priority support, and enterprise integration of these tools.
data.value: Det du køber fra Aiursoft er hosting, automatiseret udrulning, vedligeholdelse, prioriteret support og virksomhedsintegration af disse værktøjer.

data.name: You agree not to misuse the Services or help anyone else to do so. You must not:
data.value: Du accepterer ikke at misbruge Tjenesterne eller hjælpe nogen andre med at gøre det. Du må ikke:

data.name: You may cancel your subscription at any time through your Aiursoft Billing Dashboard or by contacting our support team.
data.value: Du kan afmelde dit abonnement når som helst via dit Aiursoft Billing Dashboard eller ved at kontakte vores supportteam.

data.name: Your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Services.
data.value: Din adgang til eller brug af eller manglende evne til at få adgang til eller bruge Tjenesterne.

data.name: Your subscription will automatically renew at the end of each billing cycle (monthly or annually) unless you cancel it prior to the renewal date. You authorize us (via Stripe) to charge the applicable subscription fees to your payment method on file.
data.value: Dit abonnement fornyes automatisk ved udgangen af hver faktureringsperiode (månedligt eller årligt), medmindre du annullerer det før fornyelsesdatoen. Du bemyndiger os (via Stripe) til at debitere de gældende abonnementsgebyrer på din registrerede betalingsmetode.
